scripts.build: npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/shared && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/parser && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/worker && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/web
scripts.build:worker: npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/shared && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/parser && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/shared && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/parser && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/worker && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/web
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run cf:worker:deploy && npm run cf:pages:deploy
scripts.cf:pages:create: npx wrangler pages project create statisticalsystem
scripts.cf:pages:deploy: npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/web && npm run deploy -w @statisticalsystem/web
